title: gh-axi: GitHub CLI for Agents
author: Kun Chen (kunchenguid)
content_summary: Reference implementation of AXI principles applied to GitHub operations. Wraps the official gh CLI, returning TOON-formatted output with minimal default schemas, pre-computed aggregates, and contextual next-step suggestions. Outperforms MCP-based GitHub tooling on cost (~3x cheaper) and reliability (100% vs 82-87% success) in published benchmarks.
key_points: Node 20+ wrapper around official gh CLI
TOON output ~40% smaller than equivalent JSON
Returns 3-4 fields per list item by default; --full for everything
Pre-computes CI status summaries, issue/PR counts
Every response includes next-step command hints
